parts.text: A merge gate that blocks autonomous agents is only safe if it never blocks a human. So who counts as an agent?
mergegate ships a curated registry of known coding agents — and gives you a command to prove it won't misclassify your team.

mergegate knows thirteen coding agents out of the box. A teammate named Devin? Still human — every pattern is anchored to a bot login or a noreply domain, never a bare name. A real Copilot agent is flagged. And agents check audits your repo's history before you ever turn the gate on.
mergegate. Gate the agents, not your humans. From deemwar.

cards.title: Gate the agents — not your humans.
cards.subtitle: a gate that blocks a human contributor is worse than no gate

A human named Devin → stays human. No false positive.
